{{CargoRelic
|name=Refuge Portable Device
|class_id=20312
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=When the apocalyptic nuclear war broke out, more than a thousand members poured into Vault 47. Each member was given a portable device to wear on their hand for easy management. This device not only detects surrounding radiation levels but also could increase your stats!
|fame=13
|art=10
|fth=21
|civ=18
|tech=28
|ss1=Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail DEF +1<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss2=Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail DEF +2<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss3=Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss4=Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60
|ss7=Per Fissure Incident completed, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Incidents Completed: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
